# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_precommit_black_language_version_pinned_to_python38__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/.pre-commit-config.yaml', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    pattern = re.compile('\n        -\\s*repo:\\s*https://github\\.com/ambv/black\\s*\\n\n        (?:[^\\n]*\\n)*?                 # non-greedy: consume lines in this repo block\n        \\s*-\\s*id:\\s*black\\s*\\n\n        \\s*language_version:\\s*(?P<langver>[^\\s#]+)\n        ', re.VERBOSE)
    m = pattern.search(source)
    assert m, 'Expected to find the black pre-commit hook configuration in /workspace/.pre-commit-config.yaml, but it was not found.'

def test_precommit_black_language_version_pinned_to_python38__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/.pre-commit-config.yaml', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    pattern = re.compile('\n        -\\s*repo:\\s*https://github\\.com/ambv/black\\s*\\n\n        (?:[^\\n]*\\n)*?                 # non-greedy: consume lines in this repo block\n        \\s*-\\s*id:\\s*black\\s*\\n\n        \\s*language_version:\\s*(?P<langver>[^\\s#]+)\n        ', re.VERBOSE)
    m = pattern.search(source)
    langver = m.group('langver')
    assert langver == 'python3.8', f"The code review requested pinning black's pre-commit hook to Python 3.8. Expected `language_version: python3.8` under the black hook, but found `language_version: {langver}`."
